title: pellaea ternifolia
intro: Pellaea ternifolia, also known as the Mountain Slippery Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, which is a genus of ferns. The medicinal properties of Pellaea ternifolia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant is also rich in antioxidants, which provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Pellaea ternifolia can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
